settings.question: What is Fire the Imagination?
settings.answer: Fire the Imagination is a wholesale toy distributor specializing in unique, high-quality toys and gifts.

settings.question: How do I get started with your website?
settings.answer: Simply browse our catalog, create an account, and start placing orders.

settings.question: Where are your products sourced from?
settings.answer: Our products are sourced from trusted manufacturers around the world.

settings.question: How can I contact you for more information?
settings.answer: You can reach us via our contact page or email us directly.

settings.question: How do I register as a retailer?
settings.answer: Visit our retailer registration page and fill out the application form.

settings.question: Do you offer bulk discounts for retailers?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer tiered pricing based on order volume.

settings.question: Can I request exclusive catalogs for my store?
settings.answer: Yes, we can provide customized catalogs for your retail needs.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?
settings.answer: Minimum order requirements vary by product line. Contact us for details.

settings.question: Are your products eco-friendly?
settings.answer: We are committed to sustainability and offer a growing range of eco-friendly products.

settings.question: Are your toys safe for all ages?
settings.answer: All our products meet strict safety standards. Age recommendations are listed on each product.

settings.question: Do you carry educational toys?
settings.answer: Yes, we have a wide selection of educational toys across all age groups.

settings.question: How can I see product availability?
settings.answer: Product availability is shown in real-time on each product page.
